title: Gauhati University Results 2026 - M.A 1st and 3rd Semester, M.Sc 1st Semester (Declared)

detail.title: Gauhati University Results 2026 - M.A 1st and 3rd Semester, M.Sc 1st Semester (Declared)
detail.short_info: Gauhati University Result 2026 : Gauhati University Result 2026 has been released on gauhati.ac.in. Here is the direct Link to check your M.A (1st and 3rd Semester) & M.Sc (1st Semester) Results Online.

sections.heading: Gauhati University Results 2026 - M.A 1st and 3rd Semester, M.Sc 1st Semester (Declared)

content.text: Gauhati University has officially declared the M.A (1st and 3rd Semester) M.Sc (1st Semester) Results 2026 on 04-03-2026. The results belong to the 2025-2026 academic session, and students can check their status online at the Gauhati University exam portal.

These results are essential for progression to the next semester and verification of academic performance. Students can access their result by visiting the official Gauhati University website at gauhati.ac.in and entering their registration credentials. It is advised to download and save the result PDF for future academic and official reference.

Gauhati University has published the latest M.A (1st and 3rd Semester) and M.Sc (1st Semester) results on its official website for the 2025-2026 academic session. Students can log in using their registration credentials and download the provisional results for academic reference and record-keeping.

rows: M.A (1st and 3rd Semester) & M.Sc (1st Semester) Examinations

content.text: The university has activated the direct link for checking M.A (1st and 3rd Semester) and M.Sc (1st Semester) results. Students can instantly view or download their result sheet through the official portal using the link provided below.

rows: Gauhati University M.A 1st and 3rd Semester Result 2026

sections.heading: How to Check Gauhati University Results 2026 Online?

content.text: Gauhati University has made the result download process simple and quick for students. Candidates only need their registration number and date of birth to view results on the official portal. Here is a step-by-step process you can follow:

items: Visit the Official Website - Go to the official Gauhati University exam portal at gauhati.ac.in.
Find the Results Section - Click on the Examination or Results tab on the homepage.
Select Your Exam - Choose M.A (1st and 3rd Semester) or M.Sc (1st Semester) from the list of available results.
Enter Your Details - Input your Registration Number and Date of Birth in the required fields.
Submit & View - Click the Submit button to view your Gauhati University result 2026 on screen.
Download the Mark Sheet - Click Download or Print to save your result PDF for official use.
Verify Your Details - Check that your name, roll number, and marks are correctly reflected on the mark sheet.
